title: notelaea microcarpa
intro: Notelaea microcarpa, also known as the small-leaved notelaea, is a small tree or shrub native to eastern Australia, belonging to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Notelaea microcarpa is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, antimicrobial effects, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
